candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row clearly tied to the selected COGS bucket. However, it appears as a component beneath/within the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold', supported by the adjacent 'Cost of Revenues - Balancing value' and 'Cost of Revenues - Total' structure, so adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS parent row is 'Cost of goods sold'. The explicit amortization row appears embedded in that total, not separate from it.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This label appears as explicit amortization rows under both 'Selling Expenses' and 'Administrative Expenses'. In both cases, the nearby balancing rows indicate the amortization is a sub-component of the selected parent expense rows, so it should not be added separately relative to the chosen XSGA components.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This row is tied to the selected 'Research and development expenses' line, and the balancing row indicates it is a component inside that parent amount. Also, the same R&D expense row was already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D amortization separately would risk distortion/double counting under the stated rule.

variables.notes: All visible operating D&A rows appear to be embedded sub-components of already selected XSGA component rows. The R&D amortization row should also not be added because 'Research and development expenses' was already selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
